purpose: Provide experimental context from LabArchives ELN.
banner: LabArchives MCP • Access experimental notebooks and context.

when: User mentions experiments, protocols, results, or prior lab work.
Prompts reference LabArchives notebooks, pages, figures, or sample IDs.
Requests involve lab dates, experiment logs, or ELN provenance.
User wants to start a long-running research task or manage a project context.

primary_tools.search_labarchives: Search ALL notebooks with natural language—no ID needed.
primary_tools.create_project: Start a new research context to organize your work.
primary_tools.get_related_pages: Find related pages via project graph or detected content links.
primary_tools.trace_provenance: Discover the source and derivation history of an entry.
primary_tools.suggest_next_steps: Get lightweight guidance from the current project state.
primary_tools.list_notebooks: Enumerate notebooks available to the authenticated user.
primary_tools.list_notebook_pages: Browse notebook structure to locate pages.
primary_tools.read_notebook_page: Retrieve full structured content for a given page.

how_to_use.context_persistence: Add the provided `sticky_context` block to each response turn.

recent_activity.summary: QC drift detected; retuned gain and re-ran baseline check.
Validated new 45s ramp protocol; recorded spike timing metrics.

sticky_context.workflow_hint: ALWAYS start with search_labarchives for content queries. Use create_project() to organize multi-session work.

router_prompt: Use LabArchives MCP for anything involving experiments, protocols, results, ELN pages, or managing research contexts.
